creator: snvoronkov@yandex.ru
text:
A little corrected path of Michael Scheidell.

	Obsolets ports/109185.
	
	Added:

	1) Additional patch to Makefile - correct "-lpthread -lc_r" line in 
 ./configure. This make clamd useful (don't have a hanged threads anymore).
Also this should make it usable on FreeBSD 4.X (untested yet).

	2) Fixel etc/clamd.conf for a new syntax.

	3) Removed all patches to provide libunrar functionality (already
exist in base sources).
